slots: Sea fort, Maratha heritage, coastal views

Begin your Alibaug journey at the iconic sea fort built during the reign of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. Walk across the shoreline at low tide and explore its historic ramparts overlooking the Arabian Sea.
Golden sands, seaside promenade, local cuisine
Relax on Alibaug's most popular beach, where gentle waves, coastal breezes, and beachside eateries create the perfect afternoon escape.
Unwind at one of the region's most peaceful beaches and watch the sun set over the Arabian Sea in a tranquil setting.
